name: cloud
description: /cloud <args> — wraps `hexa cloud` (runpod / vast.ai dispatch · canonical subcommand form, structured argv — never raw runpodctl/vastai/ssh/scp/curl per commons g8, hard-enforced by the cloud-guard hook). Subverbs: preflight · run · nohup · poll · tail · copy-to · copy-from. preflight = closed-form GPU mem-budget check (refuses out-of-budget specs before pod spinup · no LLM · $0). tail = live remote-log stream → Monitor bridge (ssh tail -F | sed -u · terminal-exit on a crash-aware default · commons g57). NL trigger via skill ('runpod dispatch', 'GPU pod 에 돌려', 'pod 결과 가져와', '로그 실시간 보기', 'OOM 사전체크', '메모리 예산 확인'). 0.3.4 — SKILL.md documents the explicit 3-step monitor handoff (nohup → tail → Monitor) + tail exit-code semantics (0 = --until matched / 255 = ssh drop / other = log truncated), pending the `cloud_fire` verb + `__MONITOR_HANDLE__={…}` JSON-line contract drafted in inbox/rfc_drafts/cloud-fire-monitor-handle.md. Pairs with commons g8 + g12 + g57.
